title: Eu's X Retextured
description: Remake of my first ever resource pack
body: Eu's X,(originally PacX) was my first endeavor into resource packs in 2017, it's your standard resource pack with just some personal preferences to just make the game the objective bestest and coolest version of itself in the eyes of a 12 year old, I decided to remake most of the textures 5 years later, while keeping that playful mindless spirit.
